author: Pavlo Myroniuk
description: Plugin for tagging people on photos and rendering interactive galleries. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: TheBestTvarynka
manifest.description: Plugin for tagging people on photos and rendering interactive galleries.
manifest.name: Photo-tagging

name: Photo-tagging

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

* refactor: enable all `eslint` rules and fix `eslint` errors; by @TheBestTvarynka in https://github.com/TheBestTvarynka/photo-tagging/pull/15
* feat: implement querying photos by hashtag; by @TheBestTvarynka in https://github.com/TheBestTvarynka/photo-tagging/pull/16
* feat: implement JSON scheme migration from v0 to V1; by @TheBestTvarynka in https://github.com/TheBestTvarynka/photo-tagging/pull/17
* chore: 0.2.3 preparations; by @TheBestTvarynka in https://github.com/TheBestTvarynka/photo-tagging/pull/18


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TheBestTvarynka/photo-tagging/compare/0.2.2...0.2.3

releases.author: TheBestTvarynka
releases.description:
# `hashtag`s

Now the user can specify image hashtags. The main difference from regular tags is that many hashtags can be assigned to many images. Then, the user can group a person's photos by hashtag.
releases.name: v.0.2.0
